scenarios.description: isFormSubmittable() returns false when a known formSubmit tag is requested in a non-HTML namespace
scenarios.precondition: static Tag.Tags contains 'input' under Parser.NamespaceHtml; target namespace is custom
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is false because formSubmit only set for HTML namespace
pseudocode: Tag tag = Tag.valueOf(tagName, normalName, wrongNs, settings);
